JOB TITLE
Junior AI Engineer (Entry-Level)

LOCATION
Riyadh, Saudi Arabia (Hybrid)

EMPLOYMENT TYPE
Full-time

SUMMARY / PURPOSE OF THE ROLE
Support the development of machine learning and AI solutions as a Junior AI Engineer.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
- Assist in building and testing machine learning models for real business problems
- Prepare and clean datasets using Python (Pandas/NumPy)
- Support model evaluation using metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, F1
- Help deploy or demonstrate
